headline: Alibaba, NextEra Energy, Transocean And A Real Estate Stock On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
summary: NextEra Energy (NEE), Transocean (RIG), Alibaba (BABA), and Welltower (WELL) were recommended as final trades on CNBC's Halftime Report.
